actionUnits.condition: Invoke PlaySoundsFromList (MonoBehaviour id=1026361732, script guid=76a895b5e674db04d8b4f8110c068852). Scene config: shouldLoop=0; audioClips has 2 entries. No Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger on GameObject; direct script method invocation required.

Select a random clip within [0, audioClips.Count) and play to validate RandomClip path.
